Off Calendar Jul-26-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT APPSTEM MEDIA LLC AND ROBERT ARMSTRONG's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

The unopposed application of Jason C. Kravitz to appear pro hac vice is granted.

Counsel for the defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.
